title: My Product Is Too Complex for AI. Sure.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~20s. Featured brand: Saie. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DRfi1_VCOnQ). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry objection-buster for Saie. Every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step, then cut per the Edit / Transition / SFX direction. It opens on a relatable Saie marketer muttering 'my product is way too complicated for AI,' then Masonry answers her one product at a time: the product, then the result. Glowy Super Gel, then a sun-drenched editorial. Sunvisor SPF, then a desert campaign. Dew Blush, then a cheek-flush close-up. Any product becomes a campaign asset in Masonry.
audio: Calm, clean lo-fi track with a satisfying pace. Audio-only: no voiceover. The 'the product' and 'the result' lockups stay in a fixed position; soft click marks each product, warm swell on each result.

beats.ost: my product is way too complicated for AI
beats.super: Quote-style super, casual, builds across the 3 frames.
beats.visual: Three frames: a Saie marketer scrolling on her phone, skeptical, soft pink shirt, bright interior.
beats.masonry: Generate the skeptic: prompt 'brand marketer scrolling phone, skeptical, soft pink shirt, bright interior.' Generate the three-frame sequence.
beats.edit: Three relaxed cuts of the skeptic on her phone, gentle handheld.
beats.transition: Soft cuts on the lo-fi beat.
beats.sfx: Mellow lo-fi groove; a phone-scroll tick.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-2: 'my product is way too complicated for AI' across three portrait frames.

beats.super: Small caps, lower-left, clean fade. Keep this lockup for every 'product' beat.
beats.visual: Clean studio shot: Saie Glowy Super Gel in a frosted minimalist bottle, neutral background, perfect light.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie's Glowy Super Gel to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'clean studio product shot, frosted bottle, neutral background.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3: 'the product' clean serum bottle on white.

beats.super: Same lockup style as 'the product', fade. Keep for every 'result' beat.
beats.visual: Three-cut editorial: warm amber tones, model with glass skin holding the serum, a luminous-complexion portrait, then a serum-formula macro.
beats.masonry: Three generations from that product: 'amber editorial, glass skin holding serum,' 'luminous complexion portrait,' 'serum-formula macro in warm light.' Batch as a matching trio.
beats.edit: Three warm editorial cuts, smooth slow push-ins.
beats.transition: Gentle cuts; a soft cross-dissolve between the result frames.
beats.sfx: Warm pad swell; a subtle whoosh.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4-6: 'the result' across three editorial beauty cuts.

beats.visual: Saie Sunvisor SPF stick, simple and elegant, product shot on a soft neutral.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie's Sunvisor SPF. Prompt 'elegant product shot, soft neutral background.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'the product' coat garment cut.

beats.visual: Two-cut portraits: model with a dewy sun-kissed glow in outdoor light, then a composed close-up with warm diffused tones.
beats.masonry: Two result generations: 'dewy sun-kissed portrait, outdoor editorial light,' then 'composed close-up, warm diffusion.' Same brand face via seed-lock.
beats.edit: Two portrait cuts, slow push-ins, sun-kissed grade.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8-9: 'the result' across two model portraits.

beats.visual: Saie Dew Blush in a soft compact, clean against a cream background.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie Dew Blush. Prompt 'soft compact, cream background.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 10: 'the product' serum bottle close-up.

beats.visual: Two cuts: hands applying the blush in a natural movement, then a color-formula drop catching warm backlight.
beats.masonry: Two result generations: 'hands applying blush, natural movement,' then 'color-formula drop, warm backlight macro.'
beats.edit: Application motion then drop macro, smooth.
beats.sfx: A gentle texture sound on the drop.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 11-12: 'the result' application and drop macro.

beats.visual: Saie Mascara 001 in a clean cylindrical tube, placed simply on a soft surface.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie Mascara 001. Prompt 'clean cylindrical tube, soft surface.'

beats.visual: Three editorial cuts: a hotel-suite styled flat-lay with the mascara, then two desert-light portraits with full lashes and clean skin.
beats.masonry: Result run: 'hotel-suite styled flat-lay with the mascara,' then two 'desert-light portraits, full lashes, clean skin.' One product to a campaign, all generated.
beats.edit: Hotel flat-lay then two desert portraits, slow pushes.
beats.sfx: Fuller warm swell; airy desert ambience.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 14-16: 'the result' hotel and desert editorial sequence.

beats.ost: still think it's too complicated for Masonry?
beats.super: Rhetorical close line, centered, gentle fade; add a small Saie plus Masonry tag.
beats.visual: Three closing cuts: Saie Tinted Moisturizer product shot, then two desert editorial model shots, warm and cinematic.
beats.masonry: Close on a Saie Tinted Moisturizer product generation, then two desert-editorial model generations, with the rhetorical line over them.
beats.edit: Product shot then two desert editorial holds; settle on the brand tag.
beats.transition: Soft cut to the brand tag; hold.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 17-19: 'the product' bodysuit and 'the result' desert editorial close.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Saie's products (Glowy Super Gel, Sunvisor SPF, Dew Blush, Mascara 001, Tinted Moisturizer) into the Masonry product library and set the clean-beauty palette. (2) For each product run the 'Make in Masonry' prompt for the product shot, then batch the matching result generations; use seed-lock to keep the brand face consistent. (3) Edit per beat following the Super style, Edit / Motion, Transition and SFX direction; keep the 'product' and 'result' lockups in fixed positions, audio-only with no voiceover. Saie is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
